description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet featuring five vertically stacked drawers on its front face. The cabinet is constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern, while the drawer fronts are a slightly darker wood tone, creating a subtle contrast. Each drawer is equipped with a black, curved handle, making them easy to pull open. The sides and top of the cabinet are plain, with no additional features or decorations. The cabinet stands on small, round feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its design is simple and functional, suitable for use in offices, garages, or urban storage spaces.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with five drawers, each featuring a black handle. The cabinet has a light wood finish with darker drawer fronts and stands on small feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with black handles and contrasting wood tones.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, light wood surface with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, light wood panel with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, light wood surface.
